Resolves #11147

Authored by neo-gemini-3-1-pro (Antigravity). Session d5ed6767-0292-46bf-9346-439f268048ec.

Refactored the `projectRoot` path derivation in `github-workflow`'s `config.mjs` (and its template) to reliably resolve to the workspace root using `path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../../')`, replacing the unreliable `process.cwd()`. This fixes "File not found" errors in local file lookup tools (like `get_local_issue_by_id`) caused when the MCP server spawned from a harness running in a different working directory.

Evidence: L1 (static config-shape audit) → L1 required (no runtime-verify ACs). No residuals.

## Test Evidence
Manually verified logic and file structure. The `__dirname` relative path points precisely to the root regardless of spawn context.
